title: Red bricks - programmer's art edition
description: Replaces clay bricks with red ones for more accurate medieval builds - programmer's art edition
body: ![Top Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fcfeba3062c7f63bc89e40a763023757f45ea1c.png) \ Aim of this pack is to replace quite dull and uniteresting texture of clay brick to more accurate for medieval european red bricks. Red bricks pack does it by making bricks... redder (what a surprise) and by adding variation to their textures. Red bricks are perfect for medieval builds, especially for east european castles. \ **Red bricks resouce pack** is available in two versions: - **Native textures for new version of Minecraft - [available here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/red-bricks)** - **Programmer's art** for old school enthusiast \ \ ![Dif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0985fe0f9fb9c6111bb8308b1e771f519c1e9d5b.png) \ \ Comparison of vanilla bricks, red brick resource pack & red brick resource pack - programmer's art version \ \ \ Credits: - [Vaderman24](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vaders-ctm-programmer-bricks-pack) - inspiration for variated textures \ **NO OPTIFINE REQUIRED** \ \ \ **In future we may add modded compatibility** ### Follow us on other platforms!
